description: Build the canonical bytes-to-sign for a normal CS transfer. The gateway resolves the next inner_id from the node and the recommended fee; the client signs the returned 'transactionPackagedStr' offline (ed25519, 64-byte signature) and submits it via /Transaction/Execute.
notes: feeAsString = '0' means 'use the recommended fee'. The client typically signs base58.b58decode(transactionPackagedStr) with ed25519, then includes the base58 signature in /Transaction/Execute. Set 'userData' to a base58-encoded payload (e.g. ArtVerse userFields v1) to attach metadata.
